json_data.title: Cache Memory (CPU Caching)
json_data.reason: This topic expands on the performance optimization concepts introduced with associative memory (TLB) by exploring how CPU caches further accelerate memory access.

json_data.title: Memory Consistency Models
json_data.reason: This explores how shared memory updates are observed across multiple processors, a critical challenge in modern systems that build upon the concept of shared memory and virtual memory.

json_data.title: Operating System Design for Non-Volatile Memory (NVM)
json_data.reason: This explores the fundamental changes required in OS memory allocation and management to effectively utilize emerging non-volatile memory technologies, a highly active research area.
